A traveling merchant, passing through last week.
My cousin, who lives near the border.
One of the town guards. He seemed shaken when he told me.
An old friend who works the northern farms.
A peddler who comes through every few months.
The innkeeper. She hears everything sooner or later.
A hunter who was out in the woods past dark.
Someone at the market. Couldn't tell you who exactly.
A cartwright who makes deliveries to the outer settlements.
My sister, who has a knack for finding things out.
A woodcutter from the logging camp up the ridge.
The herbalist. She doesn't gossip lightly, so I paid attention.
A courier who rides the south road every fortnight.
One of the fisherfolk down by the river.
A shepherd who grazes his flock near the old ruins.
A mason who was doing repair work on the wall.
